description: Fill out the form below and attach your CV to apply.
name: Name *
coverLetterPlaceholder: Tell us why you're a great fit...

validation.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.
validation.nameTooLong: Name must be less than 100 characters.
validation.emailTooLong: Email must be less than 255 characters.
validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.coverLetterTooLong: Cover letter must be less than 2000 characters.
validation.invalidFileType: Please upload a PDF, DOC, or DOCX file.
validation.fileTooLarge: CV must be less than 5 MB.

success.title: Application Sent!
success.description: Thank you for applying. We'll review your application and get back to you soon.

error.default: Failed to submit application. Please try again.
